title: Eon
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Conflicting|"[[To the Vanishing Point]]"|''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''}} {{Character |type=Jedi |image=[[File:Eon.jpg]] |name=Eon |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Humanoid/Legends|Humanoid]]{{CSWECite|I|238|Eon}} |gender= |pronouns= |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes=[[Color/Legends|Black]]{{CWACite|6|To the Vanishing Point}} |skin=Mottled brown |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] *[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|…Master…Rivi-Anu saved us—|Eon, to Ki-Adi-Mundi, regarding Rivi-Anu's sacrifice to save them|}} '''Eon''' was a [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] serving the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Around [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], Eon was [[Knighting Ceremony/Legends|promoted]] to the rank of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] and was placed under [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] and [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] [[Ki-Adi-Mundi/Legends|Ki-Adi-Mundi's]] charge. Eon was dispatched to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Mygeeto/Legends|Mygeeto]] along with Republic [[Clone trooper/Legends|troopers]] to attack the world's [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] base. During the [[Battle of Mygeeto|battle]], Eon and the other Jedi managed to force the Separatists into retreat. However, a [[Venator-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Venator''-class Star Destroyer]] was disabled and began to plummet towards the planet's surface. One of Eon's fellow Knights, [[Rivi-Anu]], used [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to [[Telekinesis/Legends|delay]] the [[Starship/Legends|ship's]] crash, enabling Eon and the group to escape to a safe distance. After Rivi-Anu was [[Death/Legends|crushed]] by the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] as it finished its descent to the surface, Eon and Mundi acknowledged Rivi-Anu's self-sacrifice. ==Biography== The [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]], Eon was [[Reproduction/Legends|born]] during the final [[Standard decade/Legends|decades]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Eon was [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]. Around [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]],{{CWACite|6|To the Vanishing Point}} establishes that the events of the [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] take place just before and during the events of {{Film|III}}, which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates to [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]]. during the [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]]-wide conflict between the Republic and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] known as the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Eon was [[Knighting Ceremony/Legends|promoted]] to the rank of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]], because of the Republic's increasing need for Knights in the war. [[File:Eon_battle.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Eon in action]] During that same [[Standard year/Legends|year]], Eon, along with the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Rivi-Anu]], a [[Unidentified Twi'lek Jedi (Clone Wars)|Twi'lek Jedi]], and a [[Unidentified young Human Jedi|Human Jedi]], was placed under [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] and [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] [[Ki-Adi-Mundi/Legends|Ki-Adi-Mundi's]] command. Eon and the other Jedi were dispatched to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Mygeeto/Legends|Mygeeto]] during the Republic's [[Outer Rim Sieges/Legends|sieges]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] to combat forces of the [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|Separatist Droid Army]]. Eon and the other Jedi had concerns about their status as Knights, which they related to Rivi-Anu, who spoke with Mundi about the issue. Eventually, Eon participated in a [[Battle of Mygeeto|battle]] alongside Ki-Adi-Mundi and his fellow Jedi against the Separatists. As they were pushing their enemies into retreat, a Republic [[Venator-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Venator''-class Star Destroyer]], which had been crippled by the Separatists, plunged down through the [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]], threatening the forces on the surface. Eon, the other Jedi, and the forces under their command, retreated to safety as Rivi-Anu used the Force to [[Telekinesis/Legends|delay]] the [[Starship/Legends|ship's]] plummet from [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]]. After Eon and the others successfully reached safety, Rivi-Anu lost control of the ship, leaving it to [[Death/Legends|crush]] her when it crashed on the surface. After her death, both Eon and Mundi noted Rivi-Anu's self-sacrifice. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|The young Jedi are scared about going into battle, Master''"
"''Yes. I regret that all of you have not had more training, but you are all worthy of the name Jedi Knight. I would never put you in danger if I did not believe that.|Rivi-Anu and Ki-Adi-Mundi, discussing Eon and his fellow Jedi's concerns|}} Eon was a humanoid who had mottled [[Color/Legends|brown]] skin, black [[Eye/Legends|eyes]], no [[Hair/Legends|hair]], and a sharp set of [[Tooth/Legends|teeth]]. Eon and the other Jedi were concerned about their youth and statuses as Jedi Knights, due to the fact that the training was rushed because of the increasing need for Jedi Knights among the Republic forces. Eon was also scared of going into the upcoming battle against the Separatists. Mundi, however, had faith in Eon and the other Jedi's abilities as Jedi Knights. After Rivi-Anu's death, Eon made it a point to note Rivi-Anu's self-sacrifice. ==Powers and abilities== Eon was [[Force-sensitive/Legends|sensitive]] to the Force. During the fighting on Mygeeto, Eon destroyed multiple [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] and was capable of deflecting [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] bolts with a lightsaber. ==Equipment== Eon [[Clothing/Legends|wore]] a set of brown [[Jedi apparel/Legends|Jedi robes]] and used a [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] containing a blue [[Lightsaber crystal/Legends|crystal]] during Battle of Mygeeto. ==Behind the scenes== Eon was introduced in the short story "[[To the Vanishing Point]]," which was one of four stories compiled in the [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 6|sixth volume]] of the [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures (graphic novels)|''Clone Wars Adventures'']] [[Star Wars comic books|trade paperbacks]] and published on [[August 16]], [[2006]]{{DarkHorse|url=Books/13-754/Star-Wars-Clone-Wars-Adventures-Vol-6-TPB|text=Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Vol. 6 TPB}}. The character was created and drawn by [[Matthew Fillbach|Matthew]] and [[Shawn Fillbach]]. In "To the Vanishing Point," the battle in which Eon participated was implied to have taken place on a different world from Mygeeto. However, [[2008]]'s ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' later established in Rivi-Anu's entry that the events of the story took place on Mygeeto.{{CSWECite|III|102|Rivi-Anu}} This article assumes the latter to be correct. ==Appearances== *{{CWACite|6|To the Vanishing Point}} {{1st}} ==Sources== *{{InsiderCite|89|Drawn by the Force}} {{Po}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Eon}} {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Eon |nl=Eon |pt=Legends:Eon }} [[Category:Humanoids]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified gender]] [[Category:Individuals of unidentified species]] [[Category:Post-Ruusan Jedi Knights]]
